body:
## Summary

- Fix `step_index.to_le_bytes()` using architecture-dependent `usize` instead of fixed-width `u64` in runner selection hash computation (states 001, 004)
- Fix `has_consensus_with` double-counting existing attestations in `TernaryThresholdConsensus` and `BooleanThresholdConsensus`

Both are correctness bugs in the generic consensus library that could cause nodes to disagree on runner selection or reach false quorum.

## Test plan

- [x] `step_index_hash_uses_fixed_width_u64` — documents the u64 encoding contract
- [x] `has_consensus_with_does_not_double_count_existing` — for both Boolean and Ternary impls
- [x] All 164 consensus lib tests pass
- [x] `make format lint` clean

commits.messageBody:
